net_income_gaap_note: Zawiera jednorazowy zysk $363.3M z extinguishment forward contract liability — NIE operacyjny
net_debt_note: ESTYMATA post-IPO: cash ~$6.5B (pro forma S-1 $5,534M @ midpoint $155 + repricing do $185 actual) minus $1.0B OpenAI Working Capital Loan (6%, funded Jan 2026, maturity <=2032). Pre-IPO net cash inny — to wartosc po IPO 13.05.2026.
shares_note: Outstanding 219.6M (Yahoo, = 185.2M Class B + 34.5M IPO z greenshoe). Diluted ~245M (+28.4M opcji WAEP niski, +G42 warrant 1.86M exercised). ESTYMATA.
rpo_note: RPO $24.6B (31.12.2025), glownie OpenAI MRA. Harmonogram rozpoznania: ~15% w 24 mies. do 31.12.2027 ($3.69B), 43% w mies. 25-48 ($10.6B, 2028-29), reszta pozniej. Pass-through costs >250MW wylaczone z RPO.

openai_mra.loan_terms: 6% p.a., maturity <=2032-12-31, splata w ratach po dostawie ostatniej transzy initial 250MW

guidance_notes: Brak guidance w S-1. Forward z RPO: 2026E ~$1.4B, 2027E ~$2.8B (estymaty wlasne z harmonogramu RPO).
notes: Zrodlo: S-1/A Amendment No. 2 (11.05.2026), pelny dokument z SEC EDGAR (plik uzytkownika zawieral tylko cover page). Wafer-scale engine (WSE), inference latency advantage. Emerging growth company. Lock-up ~180 dni od IPO -> ~9-10.11.2026.
